context: Agent must produce project.json files with correct scope and type tags for 7 projects, following the vocabulary constraints of the nx-workspace-patterns skill.

checklist.name: Application projects tagged with type:app
checklist.description: web-app, admin-app, and api-server project.json files each have "type:app" in their tags array.

checklist.name: App scope tags correct
checklist.description: web-app and admin-app have "scope:web"; api-server has "scope:api".

checklist.name: web-auth-feature tagged correctly
checklist.description: web-auth-feature project.json has tags ["scope:web", "type:feature"] (or equivalent correct combination).

checklist.name: All project.json files are structurally valid
checklist.description: All 7 files have name, root, projectType, tags, and targets fields. Tags use only vocabulary from the defined taxonomy.
